name: MISRA C++: Deviation Documented
description: Every deviation records the violation and its supporting rationale, and is approved through the deviation procedure.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: a deviation is a documented violation of a guideline with supporting rationale, approved via the formal deviation procedure.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C++:2023. https://misra.org.uk/
